title: Electrical Design Engineer
description:
Job Purpose


The Electrical Designer is responsible for preparing, reviewing, and coordinating electrical design drawings and documents for M&E EPC and EPCM projects. This role ensures that designs meet client requirements, project specifications, industry standards, and regulatory compliance. The Electrical Designer will collaborate closely with engineers, project managers, and other design disciplines to deliver accurate and buildable design packages.


Key Responsibilities


Design & Drafting

  • Prepare detailed electrical drawings including single-line diagrams, power layouts, lighting layouts, ELV system drawings, schematics, and panel schedules.
  • Convert conceptual designs and engineering calculations into tender drawings, construction drawings, and shop drawings.
  • Support design coordination with other trades (mechanical, civil, ACMV, instrumentation, etc.) to avoid clashes.
  • Prepare as-built drawings after project completion.

Technical Support

  • Assist Engineers in design calculations, load schedules, and cable sizing.
  • Review tender documents, technical specifications, and client requirements.
  • Ensure electrical design deliverables are in compliance with relevant codes, standards, and authority requirements.
  • Participate in design reviews, value engineering, and constructability assessments.

Project Coordination

  • Collaborate with project engineers and site teams to resolve design-related issues during construction.
  • Support tender submissions by preparing design drawings and documents.
  • Work closely with BIM specialists for 3D modeling and coordination when required.

Quality & Compliance

  • Ensure accuracy, consistency, and clarity of all electrical design deliverables.
  • Follow company drafting standards, templates, and procedures.
  • Incorporate safety, sustainability, and maintainability considerations into design.

Qualifications & Requirements


  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical Engineering or related discipline.
  • Minimum 3–6 years of experience in electrical design for M&E, EPC, or EPCM projects.
  • Proficient in AutoCAD, BIM/Revit, and electrical design/drafting software.
  • Knowledge of local authority codes, international standards (IEC, IEEE, NFPA), and industry practices.
  • Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and quality in design work.
  • Good communication and teamwork skills.

Key Competencies


  • Strong design and drafting skills.
  • Ability to interpret engineering drawings and specifications.
  • Problem-solving and coordination skills.
  • Familiarity with construction methods and site requirements.
  • Commitment to deadlines and project schedules.

postedCompany.description:
LEWE ENGINEERING PTE LTD specializes in the conceptualisation, planning, design and implemantation of mechanical and electrical heating, ventilation and air conditioning (HVAC) systems in various aspects of modern day usage.

In the field of industrial applications, we are also highly experienced in various utility design and implementation. These include :

  • Compressed air systems
  • Domestic and process vacuum systems
  • Process cooling / condenser water systems
  • Mechanical exhaust systems
  • Building automation systems and
  • Mechanical control systems
  • Complete cleanroom design adn build
